function: Detects perceived integrity, boundary clarity, and earned regard between agents
authentic_output: Honor the boundary or strength of another
information_provided: Signals recognition of integrity, boundary clarity, and earned regard in relational contexts.

response_protocol.detect: Detect perceived integrity, boundary clarity, or earned regard
response_protocol.assess: Assess proportionality and context of regard
response_protocol.respond: Honor the boundary or strength of another
response_protocol.release: Avoid domination or dismissal; allow natural decay
